title: BLOCK 4 FINAL: Fairy tale
description: Block 4 final — a complete fairy tale at 40 WPM
text: There once was a tiny dragon named Pip. Pip was small but had a HUGE heart. He helped lost kittens find their homes. He gave hugs to sad bunnies. He sang songs at night. Every animal in the forest loved Pip very much. The end!

character_tips.anna: 🎯 Block 4 done! Real fairy tale written!
